StepAction: Store has no entry for this sid; reducer waiting for first session-scoped SSE event. Once the first event arrives, reducer creates the entry with receivedAt = Date.now() and transitions to Fresh.

Entry exists; fidelity = fresh. Any further session-scoped event for this sid continuously refreshes receivedAt = Date.now() via reducer (step-internal side effect, no transition). UI memo renders normally without stale hint.

Entry exists but soft threshold exceeded; fidelity = stale. UI memo renders 'updated N ago' badge while still showing content. Either an event arrival rolls back to Fresh, or the hard threshold advances to HardStale.
Hard threshold exceeded; fidelity = hard-stale. UI memo degrades render: card grayed / collapsed / elapsed timer frozen. Only an event arrival returns to Fresh.
